name: SCC_SetOptionalParameter
title: SCC_SetOptionalParameter
syntax: long SCC_SetOptionalParameter ( dword Parameter, long ParameterValue ) // form 1
long SCC_SetOptionalParameter ( dword Parameter, float ParameterValue ) // form 2
long SCC_SetOptionalParameter ( dword Parameter, char ParameterValue[] ) // form 3
long SCC_SetOptionalParameter ( dword Parameter, byte ParameterValue[] ) // form 4
description: Sets an optional parameter after creating a message.

parameters.name: Parameter
parameters.description: ID number of the parameter, as denoted in the lists of optional parameters below each Create-function.

parameters.name: ParameterValue
parameters.description: Desired value of the parameter in the matching data type.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
